paragraph1: Riverstone Woodworks is the craft of Joseph Chavez — a woodworker based in Austin, Texas, dedicated to building pieces that are meant to last. Every joint, every finish, every detail is done with intention, combining traditional woodworking techniques with a deep respect for the material.
paragraph2: From custom dining tables that anchor a family's home to built-in shelving that transforms a room, each project begins with a conversation and ends with something you'll keep for generations.
